description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a fenced yard and features a flat-roofed, two-story structure with clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors opening onto a spacious wooden deck. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a hot tub, a trampoline, and several palm and ornamental trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. A driveway leads to a garage with a red car parked in front, and the property is bordered by a beige fence. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a mix of paved, wooden, and grassy surfaces. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, hot tub, and fenced yard, featuring minimalistic landscaping and a driveway with a garage.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with the pool, hot tub, trampoline, palm trees, and the rear facade of the bungalow with large windows and deck.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front of the bungalow, the driveway, garage, and the red car, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, showing the deck, pool, and the side of the house with a mix of windows and solid walls.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear facade with full-height glass doors, the deck, pool, trampoline, hot tub, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rear-facing glass doors and scattered side windows
